headline: Occidental Announces Early Tender Results and Upsize in Cash Tender Offers and Consent Solicitations for Certain of its Senior Notes and Debentures
summary: HOUSTON, March 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Occidental (NYSE: OXY) today announced the early tender results, as set forth in the table below, of its offers to purchase for cash (collectively, the “Tender Offers” and each a “Tender Offer”) its Zero Coupon Senior Notes due 2036 (the “0.000% 2036 Notes”), 6.125% Senior Notes due 2031 (the “6.125% 2031 Notes”), 6.625% Senior Notes due 2030 (the “6.625% 2030 Notes”), 7.200% Debentures due 2029 (the “7.200% 2029 Debentures”) and 7.950% Debentures due
